chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 152 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 26.02.2020 Mr. Ali Ahmed Khan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- SHO, P.S Tando Masti Khan (respondent No.1) has filed statement that supplementary challan against accused Haji alias Lahno Kharos has been submitted before learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur. Copy is placed on record. In the view of above development, counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition; the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
